إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
Innamā al-a'mālu bin-niyyāt, wa innamā likullimri'in mā nawā

Actions are (judged) by intentions, so each man will have what he intended. Thus, he whose migration was to Allah and His Messenger, his migration is to Allah and His Messenger; but he whose migration was for some worldly thing he might gain, or for a wife he might marry, his migration is to that for which he migrated.
أَوَّلُ مَا بُدِئَ بِهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم مِنَ الْوَحْيِ الرُّؤْيَا الصَّالِحَةُ فِي النَّوْمِ
Awwalu mā budi'a bihi rasūlullāhi ṣallallāhu 'alayhi wa sallama mina al-waḥyi ar-ru'yā aṣ-ṣāliḥatu fī an-nawm
The commencement of the Divine Inspiration to Allah's Messenger was in the form of good righteous (true) dreams in his sleep.
كَانَ جِبْرِيلُ يَلْقَاهُ فِي كُلِّ لَيْلَةٍ مِنْ رَمَضَانَ فَيُدَارِسُهُ الْقُرْآنَ
Kāna Jibrīlu yalqāhu fī kulli laylatin min ramaḍāna fayudārisuhu al-qur'ān
Jibreel used to meet him every night during Ramadan to study the Quran together.
